wallet.connectDesc: Connect with your Digital RMB wallet, safe and fast
wallet.ecnyAppDesc: Scan QR code with the e-CNY App
wallet.securityNote: The connection process is secured by the Digital Currency Research Institute of the People's Bank of China. Your asset information is used only for DAO governance and incentive scenarios on this platform.

home.heroEyebrow: Consensus infrastructure for real-world collaborative missions
home.heroDesc: Exist in any form. Create, build, participate — connect with every emerging consensus happening in this world.

heroPanel.desc: These prototype projects already span education, eldercare, food safety, urban nodes, living networks, cultural publishing, and protocol collaboration, with {{count}} simulated potential participants.

home.realTracksDesc: Huma DAO is not only for internet-native projects. We are organizing real-world missions that need long-term collaboration, shared governance, and value distribution into evolving consensus communities.

cluster.humanMachineDesc: Explore how new productivity can be organized through a knowledge reactor, agent markets, automation farms, and protocol crowdsourcing.
cluster.publicInfraDesc: Build verifiable, collaborative, accountable real-world infrastructure through trusted food systems and urban energy nodes.
cluster.careLivingDesc: Move eldercare and living from isolated burdens into collaborative neighborhood networks and real-life communities.
cluster.educationCultureDesc: Rebuild learning, knowledge capture, and public expression through open universities and visual books.
cluster.lifestyleHealingDesc: Explore new relationships between products, ritual, narrative, and community through healing jewelry.

journey.connectDesc: Securely access the Digital RMB ecosystem
journey.contributeDesc: Vote, bounties, and collaboration in one place
journey.earnDesc: Contributions auto-tracked, incentives settled in real time

feat.rolesDesc: No more fixed positions or hierarchies — join with your skills and interests, earn influence through contributions, and move freely between organizations.
feat.visibleDesc: Code commits, proposals, community work — all contributions are recorded and quantified, never buried under layers of reporting.
feat.governanceDesc: From proposal to vote to execution — fully open and traceable. Everyone can participate, and every decision stands up to scrutiny.
feat.reputationDesc: Your proof of ability is no longer locked inside one company — cross-org contribution history and skill credentials are your own career asset.
feat.beyondDesc: Open-source projects, interest groups, public goods, startup teams — anywhere collaboration is needed, the same tools can power self-governance.
feat.missionDesc: Discover like-minded people, borderless projects, and world-changing organizations — then join them, or create your own.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Explore DAO ecosystems, bounty opportunities, and top contributors

townHall.title: Town Hall
townHall.subtitle: Discover and join consensus organizations built for real-world missions, collaboration, and governance
townHall.createCTA: Can't find what you're looking for? Start your own DAO
townHall.createCTADesc: From education and eldercare to food safety, urban space, and cultural products, organize any long-term social mission as an evolving consensus community.

dao.luboomReactorDesc: A living knowledge reactor for distilled insight, project experiments, and shared consensus
dao.agentMarketDesc: An open marketplace for discoverable, reviewable, continuously deployable agent capabilities
dao.agentFarmDesc: Organize recurring digital labor into scalable, shareable automation production units
dao.protocolCrowdsourcingDesc: Move crowdsourcing from one-off gigs to a protocol network with transparent rules and portable reputation
dao.trustedFoodDesc: A verifiable food trust network across origin, testing, circulation, and consumption
dao.healingJewelryDesc: A long-term community brand turning jewelry into healing, ritual, and lifestyle expression
dao.communityEldercareDesc: A care community experiment built on local nodes and multi-role collaboration
dao.openUniversityDesc: Rebuild education around co-learning, real projects, and cross-disciplinary growth
dao.cityEnergyStationDesc: Urban nodes that continuously replenish connection, resources, and action energy
dao.freeLivingDesc: Help people move and live across cities with more freedom and relational belonging
dao.visualBooksDesc: Turn complex knowledge and social issues into visual publications with stronger reach and feeling
dao.nation3Desc: Cloud-nation social experiment and digital governance
dao.gitcoinDesc: Open source and public goods funding
dao.gitcoinGrantsDesc: Manages and distributes Gitcoin grant rounds for open-source public goods
dao.gitcoinPassportDesc: Decentralized identity verification protocol with Sybil resistance
dao.gitcoinAlloDesc: Capital allocation protocol for efficient community resource distribution
dao.banklessConsultingDesc: Governance and operational consulting for DAOs and Web3 projects

orgs.emptyHint: Sub-organizations created within this parent DAO will appear here

const.title: DAO Constitution
const.subtitle: This constitution is enforced by smart contracts, defining the governance rules and operational framework
const.smartContractNoteDesc: The following clauses are encoded and executed by smart contracts. Any amendment requires an on-chain vote to take effect. Contract: 0x71C7...a3F2

principles.mission: Mission: Build an open, transparent, and efficient decentralized collaboration network
principles.vision: Vision: Ensure every contributor's value is fairly recorded and rewarded
principles.values: Values: Transparent Governance · Fair Incentives · Open Collaboration · Continuous Iteration

governance.committee: The Joint Committee consists of 5 members responsible for daily operations, serving 6-month terms
governance.roles: Roles include: Core Contributor, Contributor, and Observer, each with distinct permissions
governance.decision: Routine matters decided by committee majority; major decisions require full community vote

voting.threshold: Proposal threshold: Hold ≥ 100 governance tokens or reputation ≥ 500
voting.cycle: Voting period: Standard proposals 5 days, emergency proposals 48 hours
voting.quorum: Quorum: ≥ 20% of governance tokens must participate in the vote
voting.pass: Passing condition: For votes > Against votes, and quorum is met

treasury.management: Treasury managed by multi-sig wallet (3/5 signatures). Single expenditure > ¥5,000 requires proposal approval
treasury.budget: Quarterly budget prepared by committee and approved by community vote
treasury.distribution: Revenue split: 50% contributor incentives · 30% treasury reserves · 20% ecosystem development

members.join: Joining: Complete identity verification and hold minimum 10 governance tokens to become a member
members.conduct: Code of Conduct: Malicious attacks, misinformation, and undisclosed conflicts of interest are prohibited
members.dispute: Dispute Resolution: Arbitration committee settles disputes through on-chain voting

amendment.process: Amendment proposals require ≥ 3 committee members or ≥ 10% of token holders to co-sponsor
amendment.effective: Amendments require ≥ 67% approval with ≥ 30% participation, effective 7 days after passing

const.footer: Last revised December 2025 · Version v2.1 · Contract audited by CertiK

proposal.treasuryDesc: Propose increasing the community treasury quarterly allocation to ¥50,000 to support more ecosystem projects.
proposal.incentiveDesc: Launch a new round of ecosystem incentives in Q3, focusing on DePIN developers.
proposal.gradingDesc: Redefine contributor grading criteria with multi-dimensional evaluation metrics.
proposal.quadraticDesc: Propose using quadratic voting for major decisions to prevent vote concentration.
proposal.crossDAODesc: Propose establishing standardized cross-DAO collaboration frameworks and communication protocols.

comment.1: Support this proposal, it's important for ecosystem development.
comment.2: Suggest adding a specific budget allocation plan.

create.title: Create Proposal
create.descPlaceholder: Describe the background, goals, expected impact and execution plan...
create.successDesc: Your proposal is now in the discussion phase. Community members can participate until the deadline.

proposalDetail.changeVote: You have voted. You can change it.

msg.1: Hey everyone! Just finished the frontend component refactor, please help review.
msg.2: Sure, I'll take a look. By the way, what's the deadline for the 'Frontend UI Refactor' bounty?
msg.3: Before next Friday. You can check details in the bounty pool.
msg.4: Reminder: the 'Increase Community Treasury' vote ends in two days, please vote soon.
msg.5: Voted in favor. Also, I'd like to take the 'Community Governance Docs' bounty. Is anyone working on this?
msg.6: You can apply directly in the bounty pool. I wrote similar docs before, happy to share templates.
msg.7: There's a meeting about the Q3 incentive plan at 3 PM, don't forget to join.
